creator: tobsdornottobsd@yahoo.com
text:
If Linksys 100TX USB NIC is connected to machine and LAN, infinite 
'MII Read Timed Out' errors occur, have to hard reset. If plugged in 
after boot, unable to access network via USB NIC. Recieve several
"Watchdog Time Out" errors when plugged in.

How-To-Repeat: Plug in USB NIC and LAN and reboot.
